title: Bridge Essay: Editorial: The bodily self and its alterations: psychopathological, neural and t

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Birth/Body** (Phase 1) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Birth/Body to mechanistic neuroscience through Editorial:, The, bodily, self, and.
**Editorial: The bodily self and its alterations: psychopathological, neural and theoretical aspects.** — Front Psychol. PMID: 39011284. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2024.1447443.
